description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, with the top book featuring a sleek black cover and the bottom book a brown cover. Both books have visible white pages along the sides, and the edges are neatly aligned. A glossy, decorative ribbon with a red and blue checkered pattern wraps around both books, adding a striking visual accent. The covers are plain, with no visible illustrations or text, and the spines are simple and unadorned. The books appear to be of standard size, suitable for carrying or placing on a shelf, and the overall appearance is clean and well-kept.
description: Two stacked hardcover books, one black and one brown, bound together by a glossy red and blue checkered ribbon. The covers are plain with no visible illustrations or text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white pages of both books and the decorative ribbon crossing diagonally over the black cover.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid black and brown covers, with the ribbon running vertically down the center.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the white pages and the ribbon crossing the top book.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat covers and the ribbon running vertically, with no visible text or illustration.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are plain, with the top book in black and the bottom in brown, and no visible text or decorative elements.
